nasb.text: Their kinsmen the Levites were appointed for all the service of the tabernacle of the house of God.

esv.text: And their brothers the Levites were appointed for all the service of the tabernacle of the house of God.

cnv.text: 他們的親族利未人，都被派辦理神殿中帳幕裡的一切事務。

ccb.text: 希幔和亚萨的同族弟兄利未人都奉派到会幕——上帝的殿中担任各种职务。
